channel.title: Fahim Final News Feed
channel.description: Curated important news from multiple sources

item.title: Congo Ebola death toll nears 1,000 as outbreak spreads rapidly
item.description:
Matched Titles:
- Congo's Ebola outbreak kills more than 1,000 people
- Congo: Ebola deaths increase to over 1,000
- News Analysis: Ebola outbreak in Africa claims over 1,000 lives as officials warn of worsening crisis
- Nearly 1,000 people have died from Ebola in DR Congo
- Nearly 1,000 people have died from Ebola in DR Congo
- Over 1,000 deaths recorded in Ebola outbreak in DRC, Uganda: WHO
- Death toll from Ebola in Congo and Uganda exceeds 1,000 — WHO
- Congo: Ebola deaths increase to 1,000
- Congo's Ebola outbreak kills nearly 1,000 people; declared ‘fastest’ in history
- Over 1,000 deaths recorded in Ebola outbreak in DRC, Uganda: WHO
- Congo’s Ebola outbreak has killed nearly 1,000 people
- Ebola outbreak: Death toll nears 1,000 in Democratic Republic of Congo
- Congo's Ebola outbreak has killed nearly 1,000 people
- Congo’s Ebola outbreak kills nearly 1,000 people, warning of worse to come
- Ebola death toll in Africa outbreak surpasses 1,000
- Urgent: Ebola death toll in Africa outbreak surpasses 1,000
- Ebola outbreak: Nearly 1,000 people killed in Congo
- Congo's Ebola outbreak kills nearly 1,000 as cases climb to 2,473
- Congo's Ebola outbreak has killed nearly 1,000 people
- Congo says nearly 1,000 die of Ebola, confirmed cases rise to 2,473]]>

item.title: Trump threatens to bomb Iranian bridges, power plants over ship attacks
item.description:
Matched Titles:
- Trump Says U.S. Will Destroy A Bridge Or Power Plant For Each Iranian Attack In The Strait Of Hormuz
- Trump threatens to bomb Tehran back for every Iranian attack in Hormuz
- Trump threatens Iran bridges, power as payback for Hormuz attacks
- Trump warns US will bomb bridge or power plant for every attack on ship in Hormuz
- Trump says U.S. will destroy bridge or power plant for each Iranian attack in Strait of Hormuz
- Trump threatens to bomb Iranian bridge or power plant after Hormuz attacks
- Trump threatens Iran bridges, power as payback for Hormuz attacks
- ‘Will bomb bridge, power plants if ships struck in Hormuz’: Trump's big warning to Iran as war escalates
- Trump Says US Will Hit Iran’s Power Plants, Bridges If Tehran Attacks Ships
- Trump Says U.S. Will Bomb Iran’s Power Plants, Bridges if Tehran Strikes Ships
- Trump says US will destroy one bridge or power plant for every ship Iran attacks
- Iran war: Trump threatens bridges over Hormuz Strait attacks
- Trump threatens to hit Iranian bridges, power plants, any time shots fired in Strait of Hormuz
- Trump: US will attack Iranian bridge, power plant for every ship targeted in Hormuz
- Trump threatens Iran bridges, power plants over Hormuz attacks
- US will destroy ‘one bridge or power plant’ for every attack on ships in Strait of Hormuz, warns Trump
- Trump Says US Will Destroy Bridge or Power Plant in Iran for Each Attack on Ship in Hormuz
- Trump warns of strikes to infrastructure if Iran targets ships in Strait of Hormuz
- Trump: US will attack Iranian bridge, power plant for every ship targeted in Hormuz]]>
